articles.title: Steve Kerr explains how the Celtics went from an ‘afterthought’ to a ‘real favorite’
articles.description:
"When we played them a month ago, I was just blown away by how good they were."

The post Steve Kerr explains how the Celtics went from an ‘afterthought’ to a ‘real favorite’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Steve Kerr praised the Celtics' improvement during a recent game against the Warriors.
Kerr noted the Celtics' transformation over the past month, highlighting their strong performance.
Boston residents can expect increased excitement as the Celtics are now considered championship contenders.

articles.title: Advocates sue Worcester over response to mental health 911 calls, alleging discrimination
articles.description:
Officers restrained a 10-year-old boy with autism face-down at school drop-off, placing a knee on the boy’s neck and fracturing his arm.

The post Advocates sue Worcester over response to mental health 911 calls, alleging discrimination appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Advocates filed a lawsuit against Worcester for handling mental health 911 calls.
A 10-year-old boy with autism was restrained, resulting in a fractured arm.
The case raises concerns about police treatment of vulnerable individuals in Boston.

articles.title: Hilary Duff will be Northeastern University’s 2026 commencement speaker
articles.description:
It'll be the commencement that dreams are made of.

The post Hilary Duff will be Northeastern University’s 2026 commencement speaker appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hilary Duff will speak at Northeastern University's 2026 commencement ceremony.
The event is scheduled for May 2026, attracting attention from students and families.
Duff's presence may enhance Northeastern's appeal and boost local community engagement.

articles.title: 3 roster needs Patriots must still address after free-agency spending spree
articles.description:
The Patriots could still use a proven No. 1 wideout ahead of the 2026 season.

The post 3 roster needs Patriots must still address after free-agency spending spree appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots need to secure a proven No. 1 wide receiver for the 2026 season.
Free agency spending spree leaves gaps in roster, particularly at wide receiver position.
Local fans may see a less competitive team without key player acquisitions.
